_note: RC4 (0x17) service ticket requested for a USER service account SPN -> MUST MATCH splunk-search.spl. Sanitized from a real captured 4769.
Normal machine-to-machine AES (0x12) ticket for a computer account -> MUST NOT MATCH (excluded by both the 0x17 filter and the trailing-$ exclusion).
A real user requesting a normal service ticket with AES (0x12) -> MUST NOT MATCH (excluded by the 0x17 filter).
